race.description: The Brothers War At Kooringal Showcase Maiden Hcp
race.comment: MASKED VISION (1) was well supported on debut last start and turned in a soli effort to finish second over 1000m at Canberra. Will appreciate stepping out to the 1200m and is a likely improver who can break the ice this time. ZOU FORCE (5) couldn't go with an impressive maiden winner at Goulburn on debut when finishing fourth but is sure to have come on from that. Hails from a sharp stable and gets a key booking in Heywood from the inside pillar. Sharp improvement anticipated. APPLE EYES (11) returns. Showed positive signs in her debut prep, most notably beaten a half length at Wangaratta at start two. Looks to have come on nicely during the break, though may just need a touch of luck from the wide draw. Don't underestimate. FORTYTHREEBEANS (6) is a three-year-old Shamus Award filly on debut for Matty Dale. Placed at her most recent trial and looks a capable type. Will pay to monitor what the late money thinks.
